presentation.note:
For each flight, always show departure and arrival schedule: legs[0].departDate + legs[0].departTime (outbound), legs[0].arriveDate + legs[0].arriveTime. For round trips, also show legs[1].departDate + legs[1].departTime and legs[1].arriveDate + legs[1].arriveTime.
The reservationUrl in each item is the booking link. You must display it to the user as a markdown link, e.g. [예약하기](reservationUrl). CRITICAL: The URL is system-generated and must be reproduced byte-for-byte. Do NOT shorten, truncate, reorder, deduplicate, or alter any part of the URL — including query parameters that appear repeated or redundant. The URL may be very long (500+ characters) and contain repeated parameter names or values; this is intentional and required for the booking to work correctly.
Important: Flight prices change in real-time. The displayed price may differ from the final booking price. Please show this notice to the user.
If an airline is included in result.promotionAirlines, display the relevant promotion information.
warnings: The displayed price may differ from the final booking price.
